title: RequestSubmitted
description: Published by Ingestion the moment a patient's raw text request is received. This is the entry point of the whole pipeline — everything downstream (IA1, IA2, IA3, Dispatch Core) traces back to this event via request_id.

patient_id.description: Identifier for the patient submitting the request. In this prototype this is a synthetic/simulated ID (no real health data — out of scope per the doc).

text.description: Raw free-text description of the patient's situation, exactly as submitted. This is the only input IA1 works from.
